title: FabricPlaceholderAPI-Parser
description: Simple command-based placeholder parser for TextPlaceholderAPI integration testing
body:
Simple command-based parser for TextPlaceholderAPI integration testing.  
Commands require OP at least level 2 for privacy/security reasons.  
Available commands:
- ``/papi parse <player name or 'me'> <string>`` - This will output into the chat the result of your string with the placeholders applied, player name defines Placeholder Context and 'me' sets the source of the command as the context
- ``/papi list <!starts_with>`` - This will list all the registered placeholders, optionally you can define a starting_with requirement to restrict the query to a certain modid
